transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-08]
[00:00] You: Let's do the Q3 budget review. Speaker 1, can you walk us through where we stand?
[00:30] Speaker 1: Sure. We're at 42% of annual budget spend through Q2, which is slightly under pace. Engineering is on track. Marketing has underspent by about $80k.
[01:30] You: That underspend — is it deferred or saved?
[01:45] Speaker 1: It's deferred. The conference sponsorships we planned for Q2 got pushed to Q3. That'll catch up.
[02:15] Speaker 2: On the headcount side, we have two open engineering roles that haven't been filled yet. That's a significant variance.
[02:50] You: Right. Speaker 2, what's the timeline for those hires?
[03:05] Speaker 2: We're targeting to have both offers out by August 1st. I'll confirm with recruiting today.
[03:30] You: Good. We also need to reforecast Q3 given the new vendor contract. Speaker 1, can you update the budget model?
[03:50] Speaker 1: I'll update the forecast model to reflect the new vendor pricing and share it with the team by July 12th.
[04:20] Speaker 3: We should also revisit the cloud infrastructure budget. Usage has grown 30% since the last estimate.
[04:45] You: Good point. Speaker 3, can you put together an updated infrastructure cost estimate?
[05:00] Speaker 3: I'll pull the updated AWS cost data and prepare a revised estimate by July 15th.
[05:30] You: Great. Budget sign-off deadline is July 22nd, so let's get everything in order before then.

action_items.description: Confirm with recruiting the timeline for the two open engineering roles
Update budget forecast model to reflect new vendor pricing
action_items.source_quote: I'll update the forecast model to reflect the new vendor pricing and share it with the team by July 12th.

action_items.description: Pull updated AWS cost data and prepare revised infrastructure cost estimate
action_items.source_quote: I'll pull the updated AWS cost data and prepare a revised estimate by July 15th.

action_items.description: Have offers out for two open engineering roles
action_items.source_quote: We're targeting to have both offers out by August 1st.

decisions: Q2 marketing underspend is deferred to Q3 due to conference sponsorships being pushed
